Dear [Employee Name],

This email confirms that your requested vacation days have been approved.

We value your contribution to the team, so please see us back in great shape.

Please enjoy your well-deserved time off.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Vacation Request Approved

Dear [Employee Name],

This email confirms that your requested vacation days have been approved.

We value your contribution to the team, so please see us back in great shape.

Please enjoy your well-deserved time off.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
